main_commit: current GitHub main HEAD; verify with git rev-parse HEAD after checkout
commit_identity_note: This record intentionally does not hard-code its containing commit hash because amend/rebase changes that hash; post-push verification must compare HEAD and origin/main.

app_reinstall.installed_git_commit: must match current local git HEAD after install; verify launcher INSTALLED_GIT_COMMIT
app_reinstall.runtime_git_commit: must match current local git HEAD after install; verify memory_atlas_build.json gitCommit

notes: Deleted only reproducible build outputs and Memory Atlas temporary evidence files.
Observed APFS available-space delta can be lower than target bytes because macOS cache accounting is asynchronous.
Application Support source/runtime and app bundles are intentionally retained for local launch readiness.

remaining_external_gate.name: cloudflare_live_access_evidence
remaining_external_gate.evidence: missing live evidence; explicit Cloudflare deployment and Access verification are still required
remaining_external_gate.completion_rule: Do not mark the thread goal complete until COMPLETE_WITH_OPERATOR_EVIDENCE or live Cloudflare deployment and Access challenge are independently verified.
